title: epiphany heartbeat_heat_intent v0
description: Coordinator intent for changing heartbeat initiative heat at global, group, arena, role, or agent scope.

storeKey.description: Optional heartbeat store key when the coordinator hosts more than one heartbeat arena.

selector.description: Agent id, role id, arena, participant kind, group, or constraint selected by scope. Empty only for global/all.

multiplier.description: Recovery-speed multiplier. Values above 1 turn up heat; values below 1 cool the selected lane.

id.description: Stable policy id. Defaults to global or scope:selector when omitted.

expiresAfterSceneClock.description: Relative scene-clock duration before the multiplier stops affecting participants.
